docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-25-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-25-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY ARTURO MARTINEZ--SR. COLLECTION OFFICER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
